update_activity.name: Update Activity
update_activity.description: Update a PushWard Live Activity state and content.

state_text.name: State Text
state_text.description: Text shown as the activity state.

icon.name: Icon
icon.description: SF Symbol or MDI icon name (e.g. arrow.down.circle.fill, mdi:download).

subtitle.name: Subtitle
subtitle.description: Subtitle text shown on the activity.

accent_color.name: Accent Color
accent_color.description: Accent color name for the activity.

url.name: URL
url.description: Primary URL displayed as a tappable button. Only supported on steps and alert templates.

secondary_url.name: Secondary URL
secondary_url.description: Secondary URL displayed as a second tappable button. Only supported on steps and alert templates.

end_date.name: End Date
end_date.description: Unix timestamp for countdown end date.

value.name: Value
value.description: Gauge: numeric value. Timeline: labeled values object (e.g. Temp=22.5).

completion_message.name: Completion Message
completion_message.description: Message shown when the activity ends.

scale.name: Scale
scale.description: Y-axis scale mode (linear or logarithmic). Timeline template only.

decimals.name: Decimal Places
decimals.description: Decimal places for value display (0-10). Timeline template only.

smoothing.name: Smooth Lines
smoothing.description: Enable curve interpolation between data points. Timeline template only.

thresholds.name: Thresholds
thresholds.description: Horizontal reference lines on the sparkline. Timeline template only.

sound.name: Sound
sound.description: Notification sound played on the device for this update.

priority.name: Priority Override
priority.description: Per-update priority (0-10). Overrides the activity's configured priority for this push only.

background_color.name: Background Color
background_color.description: Background color for the Live Activity. Hex (#RRGGBB) or named color.

text_color.name: Text Color
text_color.description: Text color for the Live Activity. Hex (#RRGGBB) or named color.

warning_threshold.name: Warning Threshold
warning_threshold.description: Seconds before end_date when the countdown enters warning state. Countdown template only.

alarm.name: Alarm
alarm.description: Trigger AlarmKit alarm on countdown expiry (iOS 26+, countdown template only).

step_labels.name: Step Labels
step_labels.description: Ordered list of step labels. Length must equal total_steps. Steps template only.

step_rows.name: Step Rows
step_rows.description: Ordered list of row heights (1-10) per step. Length must equal total_steps. Steps template only.

fired_at.name: Fired At
fired_at.description: Unix timestamp when the alert was triggered. Alert template only.

units.name: Units Map
units.description: Per-series unit labels. Keys must match value dict keys. Timeline template only.

create_activity.name: Create Activity
create_activity.description: Create a new PushWard Live Activity.

ended_ttl.name: Ended TTL
ended_ttl.description: Seconds to keep the activity after it ends.

stale_ttl.name: Stale TTL
stale_ttl.description: Seconds before the activity is considered stale.

completion_message.name: Completion Message
completion_message.description: Optional message shown when the activity ends.

send_notification.name: Send Notification
send_notification.description: Send a push notification via PushWard.

subtitle.name: Subtitle
subtitle.description: Optional subtitle shown below the title.

level.name: Level
level.description: iOS interruption level. Controls how the notification is delivered.

thread_id.name: Thread ID
thread_id.description: Groups notifications together in Notification Center.

collapse_id.name: Collapse ID
collapse_id.description: APNs deduplication key. Replaces previous notification with the same key.

source.name: Source
source.description: Source identifier for grouping in the PushWard inbox.

source_display_name.name: Source Display Name
source_display_name.description: Human-readable source name shown in the PushWard inbox.

activity_slug.name: Activity Slug
activity_slug.description: Link this notification to an existing Live Activity.

push.name: Push
push.description: Send as an APNs push alert to all devices. When false, the notification is stored in the inbox only.

url.name: URL
url.description: URL to open when the notification is tapped.

media.name: Media
media.description: Media attachment as an object with `url` (HTTPS) and `type` (image, video, or audio).

icon_url.name: Icon URL
icon_url.description: HTTPS URL of a custom per-notification icon.

metadata.name: Metadata
metadata.description: Key-value pairs of additional metadata attached to the notification.

actions.name: Actions
actions.description: List of action button objects with `id`, `title`, optional `url`, `foreground`, `destructive`, `authentication_required`, and `icon`.

user.title: Connect to PushWard
user.description: Enter your PushWard integration key to get started.

data_description.integration_key: Create one in the PushWard iOS app under Settings → Integration Keys with scope 'ha-*'.
Create one in the PushWard iOS app under Settings → Integration Keys with scope 'ha-*'.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate
reauth_confirm.description: The PushWard integration key is invalid. Please provide a new one.

data_description.integration_key: Create one in the PushWard iOS app under Settings → Integration Keys with scope 'ha-*'.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to PushWard server.
error.invalid_url: URL must use http:// or https:// scheme.

data_description.template: Activity layout template. 'generic' works for most entities.

data_description.start_states: Entity states that start the Live Activity. Select from the list or type custom values.
data_description.end_states: Entity states that end the Live Activity. Select from the list or type custom values.
data_description.progress_attribute: Entity attribute that holds a 0–100 progress value. Example: percentage
data_description.remaining_time_attribute: Entity attribute that holds remaining time in seconds. Example: remaining
data_description.current_step_attribute: Entity attribute holding the current step as an integer.
data_description.value_attribute: Entity attribute holding the current gauge value as a number. Leave empty to use the entity's state.
data_description.min_value: Minimum value for the gauge range.
data_description.max_value: Maximum value for the gauge range.
data_description.unit: Display unit shown next to the value (e.g. °C, %, kW). Max 32 characters.
data_description.series: Map entity attributes to named series. Format: attribute=Label, attribute2=Label2. Leave empty to use the entity's state as a single series.
data_description.scale: Y-axis scale mode for the sparkline chart.
data_description.decimals: Number of decimal places shown for values (0–10).
data_description.smoothing: Enable curve interpolation between data points for a smoother sparkline.
data_description.thresholds: Horizontal reference lines on the sparkline. Format: value:color:label. Example: 25:red:Hot, 18:blue:Cold. Max 5.
data_description.history_period: Minutes of past data to seed the sparkline from Home Assistant's recorder. Set to 0 to start with no history.
data_description.slug: Unique identifier for this activity. Leave empty to auto-generate from entity ID. Example: ha-living-room-lamp
data_description.activity_name: Display name shown on the iPhone Live Activity. Defaults to the entity's friendly name.
data_description.icon: Override icon. Leave empty to use the entity’s native icon (e.g. mdi:thermometer). SF Symbols also supported (e.g. lamp.desk.fill).
data_description.icon_attribute: Entity attribute for dynamic icon. Overrides static icon and entity icon when set.
data_description.priority: Higher priority activities are kept longer when the device limit is reached (0 = lowest, 10 = highest).
data_description.update_interval: Minimum seconds between updates. Rapid state changes are throttled.
data_description.subtitle_attribute: Entity attribute to show as subtitle. Leave empty to use the entity's friendly name.
data_description.state_labels: Custom display text for states. Format: state=Label, state2=Label 2. Example: heating=Heating Up, idle=Standby
data_description.completion_message: Text shown when the activity ends. Leave empty for 'Complete'. Example: Wash Done
data_description.accent_color: Accent color for the Live Activity. Leave empty for default blue.
data_description.accent_color_attribute: Entity attribute for dynamic accent color. Overrides static color. Supports RGB, HS, XY, Kelvin, named colors, and hex.
data_description.url: Link opened when tapping the Live Activity. Must start with http:// or https://. Steps and alert templates only.
data_description.secondary_url: Secondary link for the Live Activity. Steps and alert templates only.
data_description.ended_ttl: Seconds after activity ends before it is auto-deleted from the server. Leave empty to keep indefinitely. Example: 300
data_description.stale_ttl: Seconds of inactivity before the server auto-ends the activity. Leave empty to disable. Example: 1800
data_description.sound: Sound played on every update for this entity. Leave empty to use no override.
data_description.background_color: Background color for the Live Activity. Leave empty for default.
data_description.background_color_attribute: Entity attribute for dynamic background color. Overrides static color. Supports RGB, HS, XY, Kelvin, named colors, and hex.
data_description.text_color: Text color for the Live Activity. Leave empty for default.
data_description.text_color_attribute: Entity attribute for dynamic text color. Overrides static color.
data_description.warning_threshold: Seconds before the end of a countdown when the server sends a warning push. Leave empty to disable. Countdown template only.
data_description.alarm: Trigger an AlarmKit alarm when the countdown expires (iOS 26+). Countdown template only.
data_description.step_labels: Labels for each step. Format: 1=First Step, 2=Second Step. Must cover steps 1..total_steps. Steps template only.
data_description.step_rows: Row height (1–10) for each step, comma-separated. Must have total_steps entries. Steps template only.
data_description.fired_at_attribute: Entity attribute holding the unix timestamp when the alert fired. Alert template only.
data_description.units: Per-series unit labels. Format: SeriesLabel=unit, Temperature=°C, Humidity=%. Timeline template only.

data_description.template: Activity layout template. 'generic' works for most entities.

error.invalid_url: URL must use http:// or https:// scheme.
error.invalid_gauge_range: Minimum value must be less than maximum value.
